description:
Overview

#77 Model

The #77 from SHARPEYE Surfboards delivers the world's fastest surfboard with Superior Performance.

A Filipe Toledo Pro Model. The #77 features a full entry and exit rocker, sensitive low rails for maximum control and bite, and a speed-generating deep single concave that runs from the nose through the tail. The deepest point of the concave is positioned between the fins providing an abundance of drive and grip through high-speed manoeuvres. The #77 offers superior performance in various conditions and sizes but is recommended for intermediate to expert surfers only.

Built for Superior Performance.

Model Outline

Pro model. Performance shortboard outline delivering Superior Performance.

Bottom Contours

Deep Single Concave.

Fin Setup

Thruster. Recommended fins:
FCS: Filipe Toledo PC Fins or SharpEye PC Fins
Futures: SharpEye Fins or F8 Fins

Overview

CHEAT CODE Model

The Cheat Code from SHARPEYE Surfboards delivers the world's fastest surfboard developed to offer High Volume Performance in small-sized conditions.

A tuned-up, up-volumed performance shortboard. The Cheat Code features a forgiving boxy rail that minimises rail catches in full / flat sections and sub-par conditions. The bottom contour features a medium single concave that ends between the fins ending with a flat exit. These concaves combine with a flat entry rocker that flows seamlessly into a flat exit rocker, providing an instant burst of speed from take-off with exceptional control, drive and carry in small-sized conditions.

We recommend riding this board 2-4 inches shorter than your regular shortboard and adding a touch of width and thickness.

Model Outline

Performance Range. Performance step-down outline delivering High Volume Performance in small-sized conditions.

Bottom Contours

Medium Single Concave to Flat Exit.

Fin Setup

2+1 / Thruster / Quad. Recommended fins:
FCS: Filipe Toledo PC Fins or SharpEye PC Fins
Futures: SharpEye Fins or F8 Fins

A tuned-up, up-volumed performance shortboard. The Cheat Code features a forgiving boxy rail that minimises rail catches in full / flat sections and sub-par conditions. The bottom contour features a medium single concave that ends between the fins ending with a flat exit. These concaves combine with a flat entry rocker that flows seamlessly into a flat exit rocker, providing an instant burst of speed from take-off with exceptional control, drive and carry in small-sized conditions.

We recommend riding this board 2-4 inches shorter than your regular shortboard and adding a touch of width and thickness.

Model Outline

Performance Range. Performance step-down outline delivering High Volume Performance in small-sized conditions.

Bottom Contours

Medium Single Concave to Flat Exit.

Fin Setup

2+1 / Thruster / Quad. Recommended fins:
FCS: Filipe Toledo PC Fins or SharpEye PC Fins
Futures: SharpEye Fins or F8 Fins

DISCO Model

The Disco from SHARPEYE Surfboards delivers the world's fastest surfboard with entry-level All-Round Performance in everyday conditions.

The Disco is an entry-level performance shortboard that features a full entry rocker that seamlessly flows into a flattened exit, combined with a reliable, controlled medium rail. The bottom contour features a medium single concave that flows into a deep double between the fins, eventually blending into a flat exit that provides an instant burst of speed from take-off and delivers maximum speed generation whilst maintaining manoeuvrability and drive.

The Disco provides entry-level All-Round performance in smaller conditions.

Model Outline

Performance Range. Performance shortboard outline delivering entry-level All-Round Performance in everyday conditions.

Bottom Contours

Medium Single to Deep Double Concave to Flat Exit.

Fin Setup

Thruster. Recommended fins:
FCS: Filipe Toledo PC Fins or SharpEye PC Fins
Futures: SharpEye Fins or F8 Fins

Overview

DISCO II Model

The Disco II from SHARPEYE Surfboards delivers the world's fastest surfboard with entry-level All-Round Performance.

The Disco II is an entry-level performance shortboard. The Disco II is an updated version of the original Disco Model with some tweaks to provide added speed and flow in everyday conditions. The Disco II features a full entry rocker that seamlessly flows into a flattened exit, combined with a reliable, controlled medium rail. The bottom contour features a medium single concave that flows into a deep double between the fins, eventually blending into a flat exit that provides an instant burst of speed from take-off and delivers maximum speed generation whilst maintaining manoeuvrability and drive.

The Disco II model provides entry-level All-Round Performance in smaller conditions.

FILE FIFTY Model

The File Fifty from SHARPEYE Surfboards delivers the world's fastest surfboard with Elite Performance.

A team favourite, the File Fifty offers Elite Performance. Featuring a medium entry and exit rocker, sensitive low rails for maximum control and bite, and a speed-generating deep single concave that runs from the nose through the tail. The deepest point of the concave is positioned between the fins providing an abundance of drive and grip through high-speed manoeuvres. The File Fifty offers Elite Performance in various conditions and sizes but is recommended for intermediate to expert surfers only.

If you are looking for Elite Performance, choose the File Fifty.

The deepest point of the concave is positioned between the fins providing an abundance of drive and grip through high-speed manoeuvres. The File Fifty offers Elite Performance in various conditions and sizes but is recommended for intermediate to expert surfers only.

If you are looking for Elite Performance, choose the File Fifty.

HT2 YTH Model

The HT2 YTH from SHARPEYE Surfboards has been developed for youth to Push their Performance.

A truly scaled-down version of the HT2, a Filipe Toledo Pro Model. The HT2 YTH features a forgiving yet sensitive medium/boxy rail that minimises rail catches in both full/flat sections and sub-par conditions. The HT2 YTH combines a deep single concave and a generous sweet spot between the feet with a medium entry rocker for an instant burst of speed on take-off. The entry rocker flows seamlessly into a flattened exit rocker, delivering peak hold and drive where needed.

The HT2 YTH delivers the perfect combination to Push the Performance in everyday conditions.

A Filipe Toledo Pro Model. The HT2 ( Holy Toledo 2 ) is the evolution of Filipe Toledo's original Holy Toledo pro model and was developed for unequalled performance in everyday conditions. The HT2 features a forgiving yet sensitive medium/boxy rail that minimises rail catches in both full/flat sections and sub-par conditions. The HT2 combines a deep single concave and a generous sweet spot between the feet with a medium entry rocker for an instant burst of speed on take-off, the entry rocker flows seamlessly into a flattened exit rocker, delivering peak hold and drive where needed. A perfect combination for everyday conditions.

The HT2 offers Ultimate Everyday Performance, versatility and consistency in everyday conditions.

Model Outline

Pro model. Performance shortboard outline delivering Ultimate Everyday Performance.

Bottom Contours

Deep Single Concave.

Fin Setup

Thruster. Recommended fins:
FCS: Filipe Toledo PC Fins or SharpEye PC Fins
Futures: SharpEye Fins or F8 Fins

HT2.5 Model

Overview

The HT2.5 from SHARPEYE Surfboards delivers the world's fastest surfboard with added Speed, Bite and Drive that delivers Peak Everyday Performance.

A Filipe Toledo Pro Model. The HT2.5 is the evolution of the HT2. The HT2.5 features a forgiving yet sensitive medium/boxy rail that minimises rail catches in both full/flat sections and sub-par conditions. The HT2.5 combines a deep single concave with a baby channel through the tail that provides an explosive boost in speed, bite and drive. A medium entry rocker delivers an instant burst of speed on take-off, that flows seamlessly into a flattened exit rocker, delivering peak performance where needed. A perfect combination for everyday conditions.

The HT2.5 provides versatility and consistency in everyday conditions with added Speed, Bite and Drive that delivers Peak Everyday Performance.

Overview

HOLY TOLEDO Model

The Holy Toledo from SHARPEYE Surfboards delivers the world's fastest surfboard with Maximum Speed and Lift.

The original Filipe Toledo pro model. The Holy Toledo was designed to complement Filipe's aerial prowess and provide effortless speed and lift. The Holy Toledo model features a performance outline with a narrow squash tail, a medium rail and a deep single concave with a generous sweet spot between the feet for maintained sensitivity and maximum control. A medium entry rocker with added forward volume provides instant speed from take-off. The entry rocker blends seamlessly into a full exit rocker, delivering superior manoeuvrability through critical manoeuvres.

The Holy Toledo offers unmatched speed and lift in the right conditions but is recommended for intermediate to expert surfers only. Ride the Holy Toledo model the same length as your height.

If you are looking for maximum speed and lift, choose the Holy Toledo.

Model Outline

Pro Range. Performance shortboard outline delivering Maximum Speed and Lift.

Bottom Contours

Deep Single Concave.

Fin Setup

Thruster. Recommended fins:
FCS: Filipe Toledo PC Fins or SharpEye PC Fins
Futures: SharpEye Fins or F8 Fins

HOLY TOLEDO Model

The Holy Toledo from SHARPEYE Surfboards delivers the world's fastest surfboard with Maximum Speed and Lift.

The original Filipe Toledo pro model. The Holy Toledo was designed to complement Filipe's aerial prowess and provide effortless speed and lift. The Holy Toledo model features a performance outline with a narrow squash tail, a medium rail and a deep single concave with a generous sweet spot between the feet for maintained sensitivity and maximum control. A medium entry rocker with added forward volume provides instant speed from take-off. The entry rocker blends seamlessly into a full exit rocker, delivering superior manoeuvrability through critical manoeuvres.

The Holy Toledo offers unmatched speed and lift in the right conditions but is recommended for intermediate to expert surfers only. Ride the Holy Toledo model the same length as your height.

INFERNO 72 YTH Model

The Inferno 72 YTH from SHARPEYE Surfboards delivers the world's fastest surfboard with Proven Youth Performance for the youth surfer looking to surf their best in everyday conditions.

This model was developed to offer proven performance in small to medium-sized conditions. A global staple favoured by professional and everyday surfers alike, the Stab in the Dark winning Inferno 72 model is the must-have, tuned-up, everyday shortboard. The Inferno 72 YTH is a perfectly scaled version of the widely-loved Inferno 72.

Featuring a medium single concave that flows into a deep double between the fins. These concaves combine with a medium entry rocker that flows seamlessly into a medium exit rocker, providing an instant burst of speed from take-off and an exceptional balance of manoeuvrability and drive. These features integrate with a reliable, controlled medium rail to deliver the perfect combination for everyday conditions. The Stab in the Dark winning Inferno 72's proven performance will handle just about any conditions thrown at it.

It's recommended to order the Inferno 72 YTH in the same size as your go-to shortboard. Drop one inch for a step-down.

Model Outline

Performance Range. Performance shortboard outline delivering an exceptional balance of manoeuvrability and drive the perfect combination for everyday conditions.

Bottom Contours

Medium Single to Double Concave.

Fin Setup

Thruster. Recommended fins:

Futures: SharpEye Fins or F8 Fins

The Inferno 72 from SHARPEYE Surfboards delivers the world's fastest surfboard with Proven Performance.

This model was developed to offer proven performance in small to medium-sized conditions. A global staple favoured by professional and everyday surfers alike, the Stab in the Dark winning Inferno 72 model is the must-have, tuned-up, everyday shortboard. The Inferno 72 is one of the world's most popular shortboard models for a reason.

Featuring a medium single concave that flows into a deep double between the fins. These concaves combine with a medium entry rocker that flows seamlessly into a medium exit rocker, providing an instant burst of speed from take-off and an exceptional balance of manoeuvrability and drive. These features integrate with a reliable, controlled medium rail to deliver the perfect combination for everyday conditions. The Stab in the Dark winning Inferno 72's proven performance will handle just about any conditions thrown at it.

It's recommended to order the Inferno 72 in the same size as your go-to shortboard. Drop one inch for a step-down.

Model Outline

Performance Range. Performance shortboard outline delivering an exceptional balance of manoeuvrability and drive. The perfect combination for everyday conditions.

Bottom Contours

Medium Single to Double Concave.

Fin Setup

Thruster. Recommended fins:
FCS: Filipe Toledo PC Fins or SharpEye PC Fins
Futures: SharpEye Fins or F8 Fins

High Volume Range

SHARPEYE Surfboards has transformed some of our most popular models to cater to a wider range of surfers. Through rigorous team research and development, we've added extra foam in all the right places to provide superior flotation, while maintaining lowered rails that allow for precise control and carving at high speeds. More volume shouldn't equate to less performance.

Whether you're looking for extra stability or superior wave-catching ability, the High Volume Range delivers without compromising on performance.

INFERNO FT Model

The Inferno FT from SHARPEYE Surfboards delivers you the world's fastest surfboard with Unparalleled Acceleration, Speed and Flow.

Filipe Toledo Pro Model. An evolution of the Inferno 72, the Inferno FT was a pivotal model featured in Filipe Toledo's 2022 world title campaign. The Inferno FT features a Quad fin design with a medium single concave that runs into a deep double concave between the fins that flows into a flat exit through the tail. This bottom contour, combined with the same proven rocker from the Inferno 72, allows electric performance in a vast range of wave types and sizes.

Looking for Unparalleled Acceleration, Speed and Flow, choose the Inferno FT.

Model Outline

Pro model. Performance shortboard outline delivering Unparalleled Acceleration, Speed and Flow.

Bottom Contours

Medium Single to Deep Double Concave to Flat Exit.

Fin Setup

Quad. Recommended fins:
FCS: H4 Fins

MAGURO Model

The Maguro twin fin from SHARPEYE Surfboards delivers the world's fastest surfboard with Traditional Performance.

This model has been developed as a hybrid of the classic San Diego fish and a modern twin, offering traditional yet contemporary performance in small conditions. Featuring a classic swallow (split tail), 5" deep and 10" wide, integrated with a modern soft rail and a classic vee bottom contour through to the tail, the Maguro can make sharp directional changes while maintaining exceptional speed, drive and hold. Combined with flat entry and exit rockers that provide an instant burst of speed from take-off, this infusion of design elements essentially juxtaposes traditional and modern design features to enable a traditional yet progressive blend of performance surfing.

The Maguro has been designed to run a classic twin keel fin set-up. However, this model is also available in a quad-fin configuration if desired. This board should be ridden 3 to 4 inches smaller than your height.

Model Outline

Alternate Range. Alternate outline delivering Traditional Performance.

Bottom Contours

Vee.

Fin Setup

Twin. Recommended fins:
FCS: EN Twin Fins or K2 Fiberglass Keel Fins
Futures: Power Twin Fins or Modern Keel Twin Fins

MODERN 2 Model

The Modern 2 from SHARPEYE Surfboards delivers the world's fastest surfboard with Alternate Performance in Everyday Conditions.

The Modern 2 can be configured as a performance two plus one or thruster that features a flat entry rocker that seamlessly flows into a flattened exit combined with a forgiving, catch-resistant boxy rail. A Vee bottom contour through to the tail allows the Modern 2 to make tight directional changes with release while maintaining an exceptional amount of speed and drive.

The Modern 2 combines pure fun with Alternate Performance, the perfect addition to any summer quiver.

OKAY Model

The OKAY from SHARPEYE Surfboards delivers the world's fastest surfboard for Peak Performance.

A team favourite, the OKAY model features a full entry and exit rocker combined with a reliable, controlled medium rail that offers the perfect balance of forgiveness and bite. A speed-generating deep single concave with the deepest point positioned between the fins provides an abundance of drive and grip through high-speed manoeuvres. The OKAY model maintains control & speed in a wide variety of conditions but is recommended for intermediate to expert surfers only.

Looking for peak performance and an excellent companion to your Storms or Inferno 72? Choose the OKAY.

Overview

OKAY Model

The OKAY from SHARPEYE Surfboards delivers the world's fastest surfboard for Peak Performance.

A team favourite, the OKAY model features a full entry and exit rocker combined with a reliable, controlled medium rail that offers the perfect balance of forgiveness and bite. A speed-generating deep single concave with the deepest point positioned between the fins provides an abundance of drive and grip through high-speed manoeuvres. The OKAY model maintains control & speed in a wide variety of conditions but is recommended for intermediate to expert surfers only.

Looking for peak performance and an excellent companion to your Storms or Inferno 72? Choose the OKAY.

Overview

RADAR Model

The Radar from SHARPEYE Surfboards is your ultimate summer weapon in small wave conditions.

Designed for performance in 1-2ft surf, the Radar features a flat entry rocker, full nose outline, and an medium tail rocker. Full rails and a domed deck combined with a single to double concave, to vee through the tail provides smooth rail-to-rail transitions, delivering flow and control in weaker surf.

Recommended with a 5-fin setup, the Radar allows you to fine-tune your ride. Surf it as a 2+1 for added looseness in smaller waves, Thruster for control, or a Quad for maximum speed and drive.

Looking for small wave performance. Choose the Radar.

Model Outline

Alternate Range. Alternate performance outline delivering Alternate Performance in small conditions.

Bottom Contours

Single to Double Concave to Vee through tail.

Fin Setup

2+1 / Thruster / Quad. Recommended fins:
FCS: MR Twin + Stabilizer Fins or SE PC Fins
Futures: T1 Twin + 1 Fins or SE Fins

Overview

SB-1 Model

The SB-1 from SHARPEYE Surfboards delivers the world's fastest surfboard with Progressive Performance.

The SB-1 was developed to offer Progressive Performance in everyday conditions. Featuring a performance outline combined with a boxy rail, the SB-1 model delivers the perfect balance of forgiving performance in everyday conditions with the ability to make high-speed directional changes. The bottom contour features a medium single concave that flows into a deep double between the fins. These concaves combine with a smooth medium entry rocker that blends seamlessly into a full exit rocker, providing an instantaneous burst of speed from take-off and allowing effortless manoeuvrability and release. A proven combination that allows for Progressive Performance in everyday conditions.

Choose the SB-1 as an alternative to the Inferno 72.

Model Outline

Performance Range. Performance shortboard outline delivering Progressive Performance.

Bottom Contours

Medium Single to Deep Double Concave.

Fin Setup

Thruster. Recommended fins:
FCS: Filipe Toledo PC Fins or SharpEye PC Fins

The bottom contour features a medium single concave that flows into a deep double between the fins. These concaves combine with a smooth medium entry rocker that blends seamlessly into a full exit rocker, providing an instantaneous burst of speed from take-off and allowing effortless manoeuvrability and release. A proven combination that allows for Progressive Performance in everyday conditions.

Choose the SB-1 as an alternative to the Inferno 72.

Performance Range. Performance shortboard outline delivering Progressive Performance.

Bottom Contours

Medium Single to Deep Double Concave.

Fin Setup

STORMS T2 Model

The Storms Twin Turbo (T2) from SHARPEYE Surfboards delivers the world's fastest surfboard with Exceptional Hold and Supreme Performance in small to medium conditions.

The Storms Twin Turbo (T2) was developed to deliver Exceptional Hold and Supreme Performance in small to medium conditions. Featuring a medium single concave that flows seamlessly into the 'Turbo Channel' that has been added to provide the Storms T2 with increased bite, drive and hold. The Storms T2 delivers projection through dead sections with an abundance of speed, allowing progressive modern surfing in smaller conditions. The Storms T2 offers added spark in waves under 4 ft.

We recommend riding the Storms T2, 2-4 inches shorter than your regular shortboard and adding a touch of width and thickness.

STORMS T2 Model

The Storms Twin Turbo (T2) from SHARPEYE Surfboards delivers the world's fastest surfboard with Exceptional Hold and Supreme Performance in small to medium conditions.

The Storms Twin Turbo (T2) was developed to deliver Exceptional Hold and Supreme Performance in small to medium conditions. Featuring a medium single concave that flows seamlessly into the 'Turbo Channel' that has been added to provide the Storms T2 with increased bite, drive and hold. The Storms T2 delivers projection through dead sections with an abundance of speed, allowing progressive modern surfing in smaller conditions. The Storms T2 offers added spark in waves under 4 ft.

We recommend riding the Storms T2, 2-4 inches shorter than your regular shortboard and adding a touch of width and thickness.

A supreme combination for everyday conditions.

Overview

SYNERGY YTH Model

The Synergy YTH from SHARPEYE Surfboards delivers the world's fastest surfboard with Explosive Performance for the youth surfer looking to surf to their highest level.

The Synergy YTH features a mid-entry continuous rocker with a full exit rocker, combined with a medium rail that allows for tight, aggressive manoeuvres and explosive and unmatched performance. The bottom contour features a speed-generating deep single concave. Designed with a slightly fuller nose and tail pod, the Synergy YTH is a higher-volume board with a flatter deck. The Synergy YTH offers Explosive Performance in various conditions and sizes but is recommended for the more advanced younger surfer.

Ride the Synergy YTH in your standard performance shortboard dimensions. The Synergy YTH will sit nicely in your quiver between an Inferno 72 YTH and HT2 YTH and excel in waves from 2-6ft.

Looking for proven Explosive Performance. Choose the Synergy YTH.

Performance Range. Performance shortboard outline delivering Explosive Performance.

High Volume Range

SHARPEYE Surfboards has transformed some of our most popular models to cater to a wider range of surfers. Through rigorous team research and development, we've added extra foam in all the right places to provide superior flotation, while maintaining lowered rails that allow for precise control and carving at high speeds. More volume shouldn't equate to less performance.

Whether you're looking for extra stability or superior wave-catching ability, the High Volume Range delivers without compromising on performance.

The Synergy offers Explosive Performance in various conditions and sizes but is recommended for intermediate to expert surfers only.

Ride the Synergy in your performance shortboard dimensions. It will sit nicely in your quiver between an Inferno 72 and #77 and excel in waves from 2-6ft.

Looking for proven Explosive Performance. Choose the Synergy.

Model Outline

Performance Range. Performance shortboard outline delivering Explosive Performance.

Bottom Contours

Deep Single Concave.

Fin Setup

Thruster. Recommended fins:
FCS: SharpEye PC Fins or Carver Fins
Futures: SharpEye Fins or F8 Fins

Overview

ZIPPER Model

The Zipper from SHARPEYE Surfboards delivers the world's fastest surfboard with Alternate Performance in Everyday Conditions.

The Zipper offers a versatile fin configuration, allowing it to be set up as a performance two-plus-one, thruster, or quad. It features a flat entry rocker that smoothly transitions into a flattened exit, complemented by forgiving, catch-resistant boxy rails. A single concave runs between the fins, flowing seamlessly into a flat exit through the tail. The combination of bottom contours, flat rocker, and boxy rails enables the Zipper to make tight directional changes with ease and release while maintaining exceptional speed and drive.

The Zipper brings the fun with Alternate Performance, the perfect addition to any summer quiver.
